<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

THE MLE FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i]

THE TEST STATISTIC FOR THE HYPOTHESIS TEST IS [THE TEST STATISTIC CALCULATED USING THE MLEs]

THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]

THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG DOES HAVE AN EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]

THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE AT ALPHA = 0.05]

THE SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL IS [0.05]

THE REJECTION REGION IS [THE REGION WHERE THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE]

THE DECISION IS [TO REJECT THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE]

THE CONCLUSION IS [THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]

THE TEST STATISTIC CALCULATED USING THE MLEs IS [THE TEST STATISTIC CALCULATED USING THE MLEs]

THE CRITICAL VALUE IS [THE CRITICAL VALUE AT ALPHA = 0.05]

THE REJECTION REGION IS [THE REGION WHERE THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE]
